data.title: Add re-invocation guard to implementation-plan SKILL.md Step 1
data.description:
## Context
Story 2a2f-eacc: implementation-plan re-invocation guard. Today re-invoking implementation-plan on an epic/story with existing children creates duplicate tasks. This task adds a guard section to SKILL.md Step 1 that reads children, classifies them, and produces a diff plan.

## What to add
In plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md, add a new "Re-invocation Guard" subsection in Step 1 (Contextual Discovery), between the "Select Story" section and "Epic Type Detection". The guard must:

1. After loading the story/epic, run:
   `.claude/scripts/dso ticket deps <id> --include-archived` (or use ticket list with --include-archived flag)
2. Classify each existing child by status:
   - **closed or archived**: read-only — never modify, reopen, or duplicate; log as skipped
   - **in-progress**: flagged for review — include in diff plan output with WARNING note
   - **open**: candidate for revision — may be updated or left as-is
3. Log: "Re-invocation guard: N closed (read-only), M in-progress (flagged), K open (candidates)"
4. Produce only a diff plan: new tasks + reopened tasks — never touch closed children
5. If ALL children are closed: log "All children are complete — no new tasks needed" and emit STATUS:complete

## Files to modify
- plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] SKILL.md contains "Re-invocation Guard" section heading or "re-invocation" text in Step 1
  Verify: grep -q -i "re-invocation" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references --include-archived for archived child handling
  Verify: grep -q "include-archived" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md classifies closed children as read-only
  Verify: grep -q "read-only" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md classifies in-progress children as flagged
  Verify: grep -qi "flagged\|in.progress.*flag" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md uses "new or reopened" or "diff plan" language for output
  Verify: grep -qi "new or reopened\|diff plan" plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] pytest tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_reinvocation_guard.py pass (GREEN)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_reinvocation_guard.py -v
- [ ] bash .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md exits 0 (GREEN — eval test passes)
  Verify: bash .claude/scripts/dso run-skill-evals.sh plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/SKILL.md
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
